pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer blends SmearGate, Value Residual, Gated+XSA attention with MLP3.5x LeakyReLU, late QAT, and Muon training.
techniques: - 11-layer 512d Transformer with MLP3.5x LeakyReLU and ResFormer value residuals
- Gated attention and XSA in every layer plus partial RoPE and U-Net skips
- Muon optimizer with late QAT and int6+GPTQ-lite quantization
